name: Figma Config
description: A vibrant, geometric portfolio theme inspired by Figma's Config conference — multicolor accents, playful rounded cards, animated shapes, and a responsive grid-based layout.
author: CareerPilot

variables.name: Full name
variables.title: Professional title
variables.projects_count: Total number of projects (used in hero stats)
variables.experience: Years of experience (used in hero stats)
variables.clients: Number of clients (used in hero stats)
variables.skills: Array of skill objects { name, category }
variables.projects: Array of project objects { title, description, tags, url, image, category }
variables.experience: Array of experience objects { company, role, duration, bullets }
variables.education: Array of education objects { institution, degree, year }
